metadata.changelog: Initial release: floor zones, comfort setpoints, Haystack tag examples

migrations.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS hvac_zone (id UUID PRIMARY KEY, zone_code VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL, space_temp_c NUMERIC(6,2) NOT NULL, setpoint_c NUMERIC(6,2) NOT NULL, mode VARCHAR(32) NOT NULL); INSERT INTO hvac_zone (id, zone_code, space_temp_c, setpoint_c, mode) SELECT 'aaaaaaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaa-aaaaaaaaaaaa', 'L1-OPEN-01', 22.4, 22.0, 'cool' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hvac_zone WHERE zone_code = 'L1-OPEN-01'); INSERT INTO hvac_zone (id, zone_code, space_temp_c, setpoint_c, mode) SELECT 'bbbbbbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbb-bbbbbbbbbbbb', 'L2-MEET-02', 23.1, 21.5, 'heat' WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM hvac_zone WHERE zone_code = 'L2-MEET-02');

source.body: {"steps":[{"type":"selectMany","var":"zones","sql":"SELECT zone_code, space_temp_c, setpoint_c, mode FROM hvac_zone ORDER BY zone_code"},{"type":"map","var":"rows","source":"${zones}","fields":{"zone":"${item.zone_code}","spaceTempC":"${item.space_temp_c}","setpointC":"${item.setpoint_c}","mode":"${item.mode}"}},{"type":"return","fields":{"error_code":"OK","error_message":"","rows":"${rows}"}}]}
